title: German-Style Grilled Fish Skewers
description: A refreshing summer dish featuring marinated fish and vegetables, perfect for a light lunch. The combination of delicate fish and snappy vegetables creates a delightful harmony of textures.

ingredients.name: fish (delicate white fish, such as flounder or sole)
snappy vegetables (bell peppers, onions, and zucchini)
wooden skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for 30 minutes before grilling

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, paprika, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the fish and vegetables to the bowl, tossing to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread 2-3 pieces of fish and vegetables onto each skewer.
5. Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the fish is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
7. Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
